properties.name: outbox.dispatch.batch-size
properties.description: Number of outbox events claimed per dispatcher cycle.

properties.name: outbox.dispatch.enabled
properties.description: Enables or disables outbox dispatch execution.

properties.name: outbox.dispatch.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between dispatcher job runs.

properties.name: outbox.dispatch.in-progress-timeout-ms
properties.description: Lease timeout for reclaiming stale IN_PROGRESS outbox events.

properties.name: outbox.dispatch.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum publish attempts before marking outbox event as FAILED.

properties.name: outbox.dispatch.finalize-retry-attempts
properties.description: Maximum immediate retries for markPublished after broker ack.

properties.name: outbox.dispatch.finalize-retry-delay-ms
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds between markPublished retries.
